title: lysimachia helleri
intro: Lysimachia helleri, also known as golden-seal, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its golden-yellow flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of golden-seal include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Lysimachia helleri include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
